function.name: troubleshoot_system
function.description: Guides a caller through diagnosing and fixing a SunCulture system issue. Use this whenever a caller reports that their system is not working — pump not starting, low water flow, system locked, battery or charging problems, solar panel faults, controller light queries, or drip irrigation issues. Use 'escalate_technician' when basic troubleshooting steps have not resolved the issue.

issue_type.description: The type of system issue the caller is experiencing.
